untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) sustained price at band boundary for N consecutive bars, (2) pullback depth measurement relative to prior move amplitude, (3) absence of midline crossing within lookback period. These multi-bar sequential conditions and relative pullback amplitude comparisons cannot be expressed with single-bar indicator comparisons using only allowed operators. Would require custom logic for bar-series analysis and amplitude calculations not supported by allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using Bollinger Bands (price touching/crossing bands indicates extreme conditions). However, core signal logic—'remains at extreme band with no pullback' and 'pullback depth < threshold of prior move'—requires sequential bar analysis and relative amplitude measurement. The signal is fundamentally about exhaustion from sustained extremes, which is more of a multi-bar pattern than a single-bar indicator threshold. Recommend implementing as custom pattern detector in backtest engine rather than indicator-based rule.
